_README: REAL booking-fee anchors only — actual quoted, contracted, or credibly-published fees. NOT model estimates and NOT guesses. Each anchor here OVERRIDES the curated/listener-derived estimate in computeFees.js, is labelled to bookers as a VERIFIED fee (not 'estimated'), and earns higher Value Gap confidence. Goal: 30-40 real data points to calibrate AND validate the demand model against ground truth. PERMANENT RULE: never put a modelled/guessed number in here — a fabricated 'anchor' is worse than an honest estimate and breaks the whole point of this file. Leave 'anchors' empty until you have real ones.

_schema.name: exact artist name, must match rankings.json
_schema.fee_gbp: number — the fee (or mid-point of the quoted range) in GBP
_schema.fee_label: optional display band, e.g. '£35K–£70K' (else derived from fee_gbp)
_schema.source: one of: promoter-quote | agency-ratecard | contract | press
_schema.date: YYYY-MM-DD the fee was quoted, paid, or published
_schema.region: optional, e.g. 'EU-club', 'US-festival' — fees vary by market
_schema.note: optional context, e.g. '2hr set, EU club, ex-travel'
